title: OR Championship/Legends Rise/2022

{{DISPLAYTITLE:OR Championship - Legends Rise 2022}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=OR Championship - Legends Rise 2022 |tickername=OCLR 2022 |shortname=2022 |image=OR Legends Rise 2021.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |series=OR Championship |organizer=OREsports|organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/oresportsofficial/ |sponsor=[https://online.kfc.co.in/ KFC]
[https://zebronics.com/ ZEBRONICS] |mode=squads|perspective=mixed |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=5,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2022-02-16|edate=2022-02-20 |twitter= |instagram=oresportsofficial |web= |facebook= |youtube=channel/UCypl-IHNIac3duvwV0J016Q |previous=OR_Championship/Legends_Rise/2021{{!}}2021}} '''''[https://www.instagram.com/oresportsofficial/ OREsports]''''' present the third iteration of their BGMI invitational tournament '''OR Championship - Legends Rise 2022'''. The tournament is a 5-day invitational event with a prize pool of ₹ 5,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Gamezo Tech|b1name=Subodh Panwar|b1flag=in |b2=Spero|b2name=Piyush Bathla|b2flag=in }} ===Format=== '''OR Invitational Championship Legends Rise - 2021:''''' February 16th - 20th, 2022'' * ''16 Teams '' * ''Maps: [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' *** '''''Top 10 Teams''''' from '''[[Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Series/2021|Battlegrounds Mobile India Series 2021]]'''. *** '''''6 Invited Teams'''. ** Total 15 Matches, 3 matches per day ** Matches to be played in {{Abbr/FPP}} on Day 3. ====Matchdays==== * ''5 Matchdays ** '''''Wednesday''''': ''TPP (E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''Thursday''''': ''TPP (E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''Friday''''': ''FPP (E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''Saturday''''': ''TPP (E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''Sunday''''': ''TPP (E>>M>>E)'' ====Points Distribution==== {{PUBGM 2021 Points System|killterm=finish}} ==Prize Pool== ₹5,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} (≃ $2,694 {{Abbr/USD}}) are spread among the teams as seen below:
''₹‬1,50,000 {{Abbr/INR}} (≃ $1,998 {{Abbr/USD}}) as Special Category Rewards. {{box|start|padding=2em}} {{prize pool start team|localcurrency=inr}} {{prize pool slot team |place=1
